step_rationale: Elevated in acute coronary syndrome; acute cardiomyocyte injury marker.
mechanism: miR-484 is acutely elevated during acute myocardial infarction and serves as a diagnostic biomarker for acute coronary events.

references.title: Platelet MicroRNA-484 as a Novel Diagnostic Biomarker for Acute Coronary Syndrome.
A MicroRNA Signature in Acute Coronary Syndrome Patients and Modulation by Colchicine.
references.journal: Journal of cardiovascular pharmacology and therapeutics
